turns.user_message: I used to just shake things off, but now I feel a little on edge all day. It's like a low hum that wasn't there before.
That constant hum has turned into a buzz that makes my chest feel tight. I can't find my old calm no matter what I try.
The buzz is so loud now it feels like my heart might beat out of my chest. I'm just waiting for the next wave to crash over me.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by contrasting with how things used to be. This used to not bother the speaker.
